allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(json.dumps\(i, indent=2\)\) for i in data['results'] if i['level'] == 'violation']")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('type:', d.get\('type'\)\); print\('exports keys:', list\(d.get\('exports', {}\).keys\(\)\)[:10]\); print\('main:', d.get\('main'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('type:', d.get\('type'\)\); e=d.get\('exports',{}\); import json; print\(json.dumps\(e, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('type:', d.get\('type'\)\); print\(json.dumps\(d.get\('exports',{}\), indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', d.get\('version'\)\); print\('type:', d.get\('type'\)\); print\('main:', d.get\('main','none'\)\); print\('bin:', d.get\('bin',{}\)\)")
